2605.23771.title: PhotoFlow: Agentic 3D Virtual Photography Missions
2605.23771.paper_summary: Virtual photography asks an agent to enter a prepared 3D scene with no preselected camera pose or reference image, infer a suitable shot from scene information and a language intent, choose executable camera parameters, and render the final photograph. Recent progress in vision-language models makes this kind of spatial agent increasingly plausible, but the task stresses two capabilities that remain hard to evaluate together: complex 3D spatial understanding and abstract aesthetic judgment. We introduce PhotoFlow, a Director-Reviewer-Reflector agent for closed-loop camera search. The Director builds a soft photographic blueprint and proposes diverse candidate cameras; the Reviewer combines rule checks, visual critique, and pairwise incumbent selection; and the Reflector converts failures into region memory, dead-zone suppression, and high-explore relocation. We also introduce VPhotoBench, a benchmark of 47 open-license Blender scenes and 141 language-conditioned photography missions spanning subject placement, relational composition, and atmosphere/style. On held-out experiments, PhotoFlow achieves the strongest external quality-alignment composite and success rate among one-shot prediction, single-chain reflection, anchor-bank selection, and random search under a six-round rendering budget. To our knowledge, this is the first work to make language-conditioned virtual photography in arbitrary Blender scenes an executable agent task, and our results show that an LLM-centered spatial agent can already produce strong photographs in a setting designed to challenge both 3D reasoning and aesthetic choice.
2605.23771.paper_summary_zh: 虛擬攝影要求代理人進入一個準備好的 3D 場景，沒有預先選定的相機姿勢或參考圖像，根據場景信息和語言意圖推斷合適的拍攝，選擇可執行的相機參數，並渲染最終的照片。最近在視覺-語言模型方面的進展使這種空間代理變得越來越可行，但這項任務強調了兩種難以同時評估的能力：複雜的 3D 空間理解和抽象的美學判斷。我們介紹了 PhotoFlow，一種用於閉環相機搜索的導演-審核者-反思者代理。導演建立了一個柔性攝影藍圖並提出多樣的候選相機；審核者結合了規則檢查、視覺評價和成對現任選擇；而反思者則將失敗轉化為區域記憶、死區抑制和高探索重定位。我們還介紹了 VPhotoBench，一個包含 47 個開放授權 Blender 場景和 141 個語言條件攝影任務的基準，涵蓋主題放置、關係構圖和氛圍/風格。在保留的實驗中，PhotoFlow 在一次性預測、單鏈反思、錨點選擇和隨機搜索下，在六輪渲染預算中實現了最強的外部質量對齊綜合和成功率。據我們所知，這是第一個將語言條件虛擬攝影在任意 Blender 場景中變成可執行代理任務的工作，我們的結果顯示，基於 LLM 的空間代理已經能夠在設計上挑戰 3D 推理和美學選擇的環境中產生強烈的照片。
2605.23771.author: Jiarui Guo et.al.
2605.23771.authors: Jiarui Guo, Haojia Wei, Yiming Zhang, Yifei Liu, Yuning Gong, Hongjie Zhang, Xue Yang, Zhihang Zhong
